concerns.text: T026 (synthetic dataset generation) has 'DEPENDS ON: T028' (power analysis). Per spec.md FR-030 and FR-025, these are independent requirements. Synthetic data generation should NOT depend on power analysis calculation. Remove this dependency.

T028 (power analysis) has 'DEPENDS ON: T025' (validator). Power analysis (FR-025) determines N≥300 corpus size and should be done EARLY in planning, not after validator implementation. This creates a circular dependency risk with T026. Move T028 to Phase 2 foundational tasks.

T042 (prevalence calculations) produces prevalence.json but has no explicit dependency on T025 (validator) which produces audit_report.json. Prevalence calculations consume audit data. Add 'DEPENDS ON: T025'.
T050 (subgroup analysis) produces subgroup_report.json but has no explicit dependency on T025 (validator) which produces audit data. Subgroup analysis consumes audit records. Add 'DEPENDS ON: T025'.
T069d (stratification verification) has 'DEPENDS ON: T069c' but should also depend on T069a (URL sourcing) to ensure the 20-per-domain requirement is met end-to-end. Add 'DEPENDS ON: T069a, T069c'.
T097b (verify CI includes Constitution check) has no dependency on PT005C (Constitution compliance checker implementation). Verification task needs the checker to exist. Add 'DEPENDS ON: PT005C'.

T099 (governance invalidation) should depend on T097a (timestamp update) per Constitution Principle V. Governance invalidation mechanism needs the timestamp update to function. Add 'DEPENDS ON: T097a'.

T035-T038 (FR verification tests) have no explicit dependencies on the implementation tasks they verify. T035 should depend on T018, T036 on T020, T037 on T023, T038 on T025. Add appropriate dependencies.
T053 (subgroup integration test) has no explicit dependencies. Should depend on T050 (subgroup analysis implementation) and T052 (subgroup CSV extension). Add 'DEPENDS ON: T050, T052'.
T054 (US2 contract test for prevalence) has no explicit dependencies. Should depend on T042 (prevalence implementation). Add 'DEPENDS ON: T042'.
T031 is tagged [P] (parallel-safe) but it aborts the pipeline with ERR-801 if Monte-Carlo validation fails. This is a blocking prerequisite, NOT parallel-safe. Remove [P] tag.
